debug_info.goal:
case right.right
𝕜 : Type u_1
E✝ : Type u_2
F : Type u_3
inst✝¹¹ : RCLike 𝕜
inst✝¹⁰ : NormedAddCommGroup E✝
inst✝⁹ : AdjointSpace 𝕜 E✝
inst✝⁸ : NormedAddCommGroup F
inst✝⁷ : AdjointSpace ℝ F
X : Type ?u.131222
inst✝⁶ : NormedAddCommGroup X
inst✝⁵ : AdjointSpace 𝕜 X
Y : Type ?u.131240
inst✝⁴ : NormedAddCommGroup Y
inst✝³ : AdjointSpace 𝕜 Y
ι : Type u_4
inst✝² : Fintype ι
E : ι → Type u_5
inst✝¹ : (i : ι) → NormedAddCommGroup (E i)
inst✝ : (i : ι) → AdjointSpace 𝕜 (E i)
cx dx : ℝ
hcx : cx > 0
hdx : dx > 0
_hx : ∀ (x : X), cx • ‖x‖ ^ 2 ≤ re ⟪x, x⟫_𝕜 ∧ re ⟪x, x⟫_𝕜 ≤ dx • ‖x‖ ^ 2
cy dy : ℝ
hcy : cy > 0
hdy : dy > 0
_hy : ∀ (x : X), cy • ‖x‖ ^ 2 ≤ re ⟪x, x⟫_𝕜 ∧ re ⟪x, x⟫_𝕜 ≤ dy • ‖x‖ ^ 2
x : X
y : Y
⊢ (cx * cx + cy * cy) • ‖(x, y)‖ ^ 2 ≤ re ⟪(x, y), (x, y)⟫_𝕜 ∧
    re ⟪(x, y), (x, y)⟫_𝕜 ≤ (dx * dx + dy * dy) • ‖(x, y)‖ ^ 2

failed_attempts:
have hx1 := (_hx x).1
      have hx2 := (_hx x).2
      have hy1 := (_hy y).1
      have hy2 := (_hy y).2
      have h_norm_sq : ‖(x, y)‖ ^ 2 ≤ ‖x‖ ^ 2 + ‖y‖ ^ 2 := by
        simp only [Prod.norm_def]
        rcases le_total ‖x‖ ‖y‖ with h | h
        · simp [max_eq_right h, sq_nonneg]
        · simp [max_eq_left h, sq_nonneg]
      have h_fst : ‖x‖ ^ 2 ≤ ‖(x, y)‖ ^ 2 := by
        nlinarith [norm_fst_le (x, y), norm_nonneg x,
                   norm_nonneg (show X × Y from (x, y))]
      have h_snd : ‖y‖ ^ 2 ≤ ‖(x, y)‖ ^ 2 := by
        nlinarith [norm_snd_le (x, y), norm_nonneg y,
                   norm_nonneg (show X × Y from (x, y))]
      simp only [Inner.inner, map_add] at *
      have hmin_le_cx : min cx cy ≤ cx := min_le_left cx cy
      have hmin_le_cy : min cx cy ≤ cy := min_le_right cx cy
      have hmin_pos : 0 ≤ min cx cy := le_min hcx.le hcy.le
      have hmin_norm : min cx cy * ‖(x, y)‖ ^ 2 ≤ min cx cy * (‖x‖ ^ 2 + ‖y‖ ^ 2) :=
        mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left h_norm_sq hmin_pos
      have hdx_fst : dx * ‖x‖ ^ 2 ≤ dx * ‖(x, y)‖ ^ 2 :=
        mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left h_fst hdx.le
      have hdy_snd : dy * ‖y‖ ^ 2 ≤ dy * ‖(x, y)‖ ^ 2 :=
        mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left h_snd hdy.le
      simp only [smul_eq_mul] at *
      constructor <;> nlinarith [sq_nonneg ‖x‖, sq_nonneg ‖y‖]
